Who We Are

Two Decades of
Relentless
Evolution

"When your clients become your advocates, growth becomes inevitable. Earn that trust every day — and the ceiling disappears entirely."— Amit Sujan · President & CEO, ITCAN

Founded in Singapore in 2004, ITCAN has grown into one of Asia-Pacific's most trusted enterprise technology partners — built on precision, proven over two decades.

2,000+ specialists. Six nations. One mandate: technology that moves your business forward.

2004
Founded in Singapore with 3 people. First enterprise mandates won within weeks.
2007
Inaugural Enterprise 50 Startup Award & Shell Live Wire Award.
2010
Entrepreneur of the Year — Rotary-ASME. Regional expansion accelerates.
2018
Singapore Enterprise Medal of Honour from Singapore Management University.
2024
World's Greatest Brands & Leaders. 10th Enterprise 50 triumph. 2,000+ strong.
01
Client-First
Every engagement engineered to your exact operational reality — with the rigour, scale, and accountability of a global enterprise partner.
02
International Powerhouse
Headquartered in Singapore. Six nations. Fifteen markets. Global scale, local precision.
03
Consistently Recognised
35+ industry distinctions. 10× Enterprise 50. Singapore Enterprise Medal of Honour. World's Greatest Brands 2024.
04
EVER Culture
The operating principle behind ITCAN's 2,000-strong team — cultivating talent, rewarding excellence, and building leaders who define industries.

The Business Times · SME · 2023
ITCAN's CEO Walks the Talk

The Business Times sits down with Amit Sujan, President & CEO of ITCAN, on what it means to lead with conviction — how the EVER framework became the backbone of a 2,000-strong team, and why a people-first culture remains ITCAN's single greatest competitive advantage across two decades of unbroken growth.

"Our biggest priority is our people. We maintain meaningful relationships with customers — continuously training and upskilling, even funding courses — because a committed, growing team is the only foundation for lasting success."
Amit Sujan · President & CEO · The Business Times, 2024

Our People

Powered by
EVER Culture

2,000 professionals. Six nations. One shared standard of excellence — specialists unified by a single mandate: outcomes that endure.

The EVER framework — Encourage, Value, Empower, Reward — is how ITCAN attracts, retains, and grows the talent that Asia-Pacific's most demanding enterprises depend on.

E
Encourage Innovation
Every voice heard. Every idea valued. The status quo is never the destination.
V
Value Teamwork
No silos. No hierarchy of credit. One integrated organisation operating at continental scale — with the cohesion of a founding team.
E
Empower Leaders
We invest in people with conviction — because today's talent, properly nurtured, becomes tomorrow's defining force.
R
Reward Performance
Excellence is not merely expected — it is celebrated and richly rewarded.
Global Presence

Six Nations.
Fifteen Markets.
One Uncompromising Standard.

ITCAN operates through an expanding international network, combining local understanding with global expertise to ensure consistent, high-quality service regardless of geography.
